---
title: "Intro to the AOP Canopy Nitrogen Data Product"
syncID: 4223457759904e42ae70cfa5c3b84ea0
description: Introduction to the Canopy Nitrogen product, including visualizing the
  4 bands and masking.
dateCreated: "2026-04-01"
authors: Bridget Hass
contributors: Shashi Konduri
estimatedTime: 30 minutes
packagesLibraries: neonUtilities, terra, rasterio
topics: "canopy-nitrogen, foliar-traits, raster, model, hyperspectral"
subtopics: null
languagesTool: R, API, Python
dataProduct: DP3.30018.002
code1: null
tutorialSeries: null
urlTitle: "intro-canopy-nitrogen"
---


```{r setup, echo=FALSE}

library(htmltools)

```


```{r html, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}

htmltools::includeHTML("C:/NEON-Data-Skills/tutorials/Tabbed/AOP/canopy-nitrogen/intro-canopy-nitrogen-content.html")
```
